title: Speaking Practice: Introducing Yourself in Japanese
description: Practice speaking Japanese through role-plays and self-introduction exercises.

blocks.title: Scene 1: First Day at Japanese Language Class
blocks.context: It's your first day at a Japanese language school in Tokyo. A Japanese classmate sits next to you and wants to get to know you.
blocks.goal: Introduce yourself in Japanese, ask their name, and say where you're from.
usefulPhrases: はじめまして！(Hajimemashite!) — Nice to meet you!
わたしのなまえは___です。(Watashi no namae wa ___ desu.) — My name is ___.
アメリカからきました。(Amerika kara kimashita.) — I am from America.
おなまえは？(Onamae wa?) — What is your name?
よろしくおねがいします！(Yoroshiku onegai shimasu!) — Please treat me kindly!

blocks.title: Scene 2: At a Japanese Souvenir Shop
blocks.context: You're browsing a souvenir shop in Tokyo. The shopkeeper greets you warmly.
blocks.goal: Respond to the greeting, ask for something, and thank the shopkeeper.
usefulPhrases: いらっしゃいませ！(Irasshaimase!) — Welcome! (shopkeeper's greeting)
これをください。(Kore wo kudasai.) — I'd like this one, please.
いくらですか？(Ikura desu ka?) — How much is this?
ありがとうございます！(Arigatou gozaimasu!) — Thank you!

blocks.prompt:
Practice speaking aloud — give a 1-minute self-introduction in Japanese:
1. Greet and introduce yourself (はじめまして！わたしのなまえは...)
2. Say where you're from
3. Say why you're learning Japanese
4. Mention something you like
5. End with よろしくおねがいします
hints: はじめまして！わたしのなまえは___です。(Nice to meet you! My name is ___.)
アメリカ/イギリスからきました。(I'm from America/England.)
にほんのアニメ/ゲームがすきです！(I like Japanese anime/games!)
よろしくおねがいします！(Please treat me kindly!)
